nodes.label: Admin API Views — Transporti V1 Sprint 2: Aggregation endpoints for admin dashbo
GET /api/admin/stats/     Dashboard KPIs aggregated from real data.
POST /api/admin/jobs/<id>/cancel/     Admin cancels a job with mandatory reason.
PATCH /api/admin/jobs/<id>/status/     Admin forces a status change with mandato
GET /api/admin/jobs/     All jobs with client/transporter details.     Supports:
GET /api/admin/jobs/<id>/     Detailed view of a single job for admin panel.
GET /api/admin/users/     All non-admin users with trust/activity info.     Supp
GET /api/admin/activity/     Recent platform activity from AuditLog + computed e
POST /api/admin/escrow/<id>/release/     P1: Admin manually releases a HELD escr
POST /api/admin/escrow/<id>/refund/     P1: Admin manually refunds a HELD or FAI
